/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librelbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o librelbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/relbot_motors__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/relbot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/relbot_msgs/msg/detail/dds_fastrtps/relbot_motors_stamped__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib:/home/ubuntu/Robotics/ros2_ws/build/relbot_msgs: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so librelbot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.5 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
